description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 36 squaremeters, located on the 25th floor, at The Base
Sukhumvit 77 building, in the popular Watthana district near BTS On Nut. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2013
 * 24-hours security
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Security cameras
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * Kids play area
 * Basketball court




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Our fast, professional, and multilingual team focuses on residential properties for rent and sell across Thailand in Bangkok,
Phuket, Pattaya, Hua Hin, Koh Samui, Chiang Mai and many other locations. We are one of the leading real estate agents in Thailand
and can offer you all available rental and sale units.

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.

description.en: This property is a 30 SqM condo with 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom that is available for sale. It is part of the The Base Sukhumvit 77 project in Phra Khanong Nuea, Bangkok and was completed in Dec 2012. You can buy this condo for a base price of ฿2,950,000 (฿98,333/SqM) and it is also available for long term rentals starting from ฿14,000 per month.

summary.th: เช่า: 1 นอน 30 ตร.ม. ราคา 15,000 บาท (DotProperty #7360c6b0fbb0-db4e-ce62-9f07-18d8a089)

description.en:
30 sq.m. | 1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom | 37th Floor | Near BTS On Nut
Enjoy panoramic Bangkok views from this well-located 30 sq.m. condominium on the 37th floor of The Base Sukhumvit 77, a popular Sansiri development in the vibrant On Nut area.
The unit is ideal for an expatriate, professional, couple, or long-term resident looking for convenient access to central Bangkok while enjoying a quieter residential environment.
Property Details

Approximately 30 sq.m.
1 bedroom
1 bathroom
Separate living area
Kitchen area
Private balcony
Located on the 37th floor
High-floor city views
Air-conditioned
Available for long-term rental
Suitable for foreign tenants

Rental price: 15,000 THBMinimum lease: 1 YearAvailability: 1st July 2026Security deposit: 2 Months Rent
Condominium Facilities
Residents have access to a wide range of shared facilities, including:

Large swimming pool
Fully equipped fitness centre
Landscaped gardens and green spaces
Children’s playground
Basketball or multi-purpose sports court
On-site 7/11, restaurants and laundry services
Resident parking
Motorcycle parking
Passenger lifts
CCTV surveillance
Key-card access
24-hour security

 
Excellent On Nut Location
The condominium

summary.th: เช่า: 1 นอน 31 ตร.ม. ราคา 13,000 บาท (DotProperty #a46c5cd6b2ba-c9de-e172-6e57-ebe5a089)

description.en:
🏙️✨ FOR RENT : The Base Sukhumvit 77 | 13,000 THB/Month

⭐ Multiple units available in this project—price is negotiable upon contract!

The Base Sukhumvit 77 is a modern high-rise condominium located in the vibrant On Nut neighborhood, offering convenient access to BTS On Nut. The project is surrounded by shopping malls, supermarkets, office buildings, restaurants, cafes, and lifestyle destinations. With contemporary design, complete facilities, and excellent connectivity, it is an ideal choice for comfortable urban living.

Rental Price: 13,000 THB / Month

Unit Details:

• 1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom
• 31 sq.m.
• 9th Floor
• Building B

Rental Terms:

• Minimum 1-year contract
• 2 months security deposit
• 1 month rental in advance

Special Note:

• Viewing can be arranged upon request
• Direct booking to the owner's account for your safety
• Priority is given to the first party who confirms the reservation

Contact Us:

Call: [hidden phone]
WhatsApp: [hidden phone]
[hidden line]
Email: [hidden email]
Facebook Messenger: m.me/[hidden phone]

Home Property Consulting Co., Ltd.
